recent_bad_license_projects.name: aspose-page
recent_bad_license_projects.summary: Aspose.Page for Python via .NET makes your Python Apps instantly support to work with XPS, EPS/PS documents without installing any 3rd party software. It helps developers create/edit XPS documents while working with canvas, paths, and glyph elements. Utilize a set of primitives, such as, elliptical arcs, straights lines, Bezier curve segments to create vector graphics. Add default print tickets and preserve them in the XPS file. Link print ticket objects among job/document/page.
recent_bad_license_projects.author: Aspose
